historical_context.era: Golden Age of Whaling, mid-19th Century
historical_context.location: Open Atlantic in a cedar whaleboat, high-seas action
historical_context.atmosphere: Adrenaline, danger, visceral struggle, wet and cold

lead_subject.name: The Azorean Boatsteerer
lead_subject.features: Deep-set dark eyes, wind-whipped dark hair, dark skin with uneven tan lines and glistening seawater
lead_subject.action: Standing at the bow, unposed, intensely focused on something out of frame, hands gripping a harpoon
lead_subject.attire: Open-collar linen shirt with visible repairs, heavy with water, rough salt-stained trousers

secondary_subject.name: The First Oarsman
secondary_subject.features: Tensed neck muscles, sun-baked shoulders, sweat-soaked hair sticking to forehead
secondary_subject.action: Caught mid-stroke, rowing with exhaustion, mouth slightly open for air
secondary_subject.attire: Tattered wool vest, bare-armed, showing real skin blemishes and sunspots

tertiary_subject.name: The Second Oarsman
tertiary_subject.features: Squinting heavily against sea spray, youthful face but hardened by labor
tertiary_subject.action: Strained effort, bracing against a wave, partially obscured by splashing water
tertiary_subject.attire: Rough-spun homespun shirt with rolled-up, uneven sleeves

cinematography.camera_lens: Primitive action lens, equivalent to 35mm, high spherical aberration, natural motion blur on the oars and water
cinematography.lighting: Harsh, uncorrected midday sun with aggressive water reflections, deep shadows, lens flare from seawater on the glass
cinematography.composition: Dynamic POV from another whaleboat, unstable framing, chaotic action shot, center focus with blurred edges

aesthetic_specs.textures: Splashing seawater with realistic droplets, wet cedar wood, oxidized harpoon iron, oily skin, wet fabric clinging to bodies
aesthetic_specs.color_palette: Stormy Atlantic grey-blue, dark skin tones, natural cedar browns, frothy sea-foam white
aesthetic_specs.film_style: Authentic Wet Plate Collodion on glass, organic chemical artifacts at the edges, metallic silver highlights, gritty physical texture, dust spots

master_prompt: A visceral, candid mid-19th century action-photograph captured on a Wet Plate Collodion glass negative. The scene shows three Azorean whalers in a small cedar boat amidst a rough Atlantic sea. The 20-year-old lead Boatsteerer is standing at the bow, his dark skin wet and glistening, eyes locked on a target. Two muscular oarsmen are caught in a moment of intense, unposed physical struggle behind him. The image shows realistic motion blur on the moving oars and splashing water. Shot with a primitive wide lens, it exhibits natural optical imperfections like lens haze and edge blurring. The lighting is harsh and natural, with realistic shadows and sun-flare. This is a gritty historical artifact, completely free of digital smoothness or artificial AI symmetry.
negative_prompt: ai-generated, digital art, 3d, rendering, smooth skin, symmetrical face, studio lighting, clean clothes, plastic, life jackets, modern boat, vibrant colors, sharpened, watermark, text
